summary: Comprehensive testing of NH GOODS wholesale mobile app completed. All backend APIs (22/22) and frontend features tested successfully. Fixed 2 MongoDB ObjectId serialization bugs in /api/orders and /api/admin/activity endpoints.
critical_code_review_comments: JWT_SECRET key is 30 bytes (warning in logs), consider using 32+ bytes for production
All MongoDB ObjectId fields are properly excluded from API responses
Environment variables are correctly used for all URLs and credentials
Auth flow works correctly with phone + PIN authentication
Geofencing implementation is functional with 100m radius
seed_data_creation: Database seeded with admin user (1234567890/1234), demo customer (9876543210/5678), 8 products across 4 categories, and 3 flash deals
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features tested and working. Backend APIs return clean JSON without MongoDB ObjectId. Frontend navigation, authentication, catalog, cart, orders, profile, and admin panel all functional. Mobile-first design with Navy Blue and Gold theme correctly implemented.

backend_test_details.health_and_seed: ✓ Health check and database seeding working
backend_test_details.authentication: ✓ Admin and customer login successful, invalid credentials rejected, /auth/me endpoint working
backend_test_details.categories: ✓ 4 categories returned without authentication (bakery, cakes_sweets, premium_snacks, energy_beverages)
backend_test_details.products: ✓ All products retrieved, category filtering works, authentication required
backend_test_details.flash_deals: ✓ 3 flash deals returned (Sahale Glazed Nuts, Pringles Original, 5-hour Energy)
backend_test_details.orders: ✓ Create order, get orders, get last order all working
backend_test_details.reorder: ✓ Reorder functionality creates new order from existing order
backend_test_details.location_tracking: ✓ Location update with geofencing calculation working
backend_test_details.admin_endpoints: ✓ Get users, create user, customer presence, activity logs all working. Customer access properly blocked (403)

frontend_test_details.splash_screen: ✓ NH GOODS branding, Get Started button, badges (FREE DELIVERY, NO MINIMUM ORDER)
frontend_test_details.login_screen: ✓ Phone + PIN inputs, language selector, demo credentials displayed, Sign In button
frontend_test_details.home_screen: ✓ Welcome message, admin button (for admin), Flash Deals (3 deals), Categories (4 with icons), Products section, WhatsApp button, bottom navigation
frontend_test_details.catalog_screen: ✓ Search bar, category filters (All Categories, Bakery, Cakes & Sweets, Premium Snacks, Energy & Beverages), product cards with wholesale/retail prices, Add to Cart buttons, stock indicators
frontend_test_details.profile_screen: ✓ User info (name, phone, shop), language selector (English selected), Digital Invoice Vault, Quick Actions (Admin Panel, Order History), Logout button
frontend_test_details.admin_panel: ✓ Customer Presence (LIVE TRACKING), Manage Users, View Orders, Manage Products, Voice Orders, Activity Log

features_verified: Multi-language support (English, Spanish, Urdu with RTL)
4 product categories with proper icons and colors
Flash Deals section with 3 active deals
Admin dashboard with customer presence tracking
Search and category filtering in catalog
rca_of_issue: Two endpoints (/api/orders and /api/admin/activity) were returning MongoDB documents with _id field which is not JSON serializable. Root cause: Missing ObjectId exclusion in response serialization. Fix: Added list comprehension to filter out _id field before returning results, consistent with other endpoints in the codebase.
